stemHtml: Immediately after take-off, an aircraft is experiencing communication failure. What would be an appropriate course of action?

options.a: Join the traffic circuit to land and try to establish communication with ATC using all available means.
options.b: Proceed on the runway heading, level off at the minimum sector altitude and set the transponder code to 7500.
options.c: Set the transponder code to 7700 and proceed towards destination, in accordance with the flight plan.
options.d: Rock the aircraft wings and flash the navigational lights, at irregular intervals, to signal a communication failure.
